query:
-- S0085: Canberra Airport → Zambrero - Canberra Centre Outlet (C2740)
-- Note: Canberra Airport ≠ Canberra Centre, but account 192549800 is the Zambrero account
-- Use the Zambrero account match instead: find which Zambrero customer has Canberra Airport
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Zambrero%' AND (name LIKE '%Majura%' OR name LIKE '%Airport%' OR name LIKE '%ACT%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- S0085: Canberra Airport → Zambrero - Canberra Centre Outlet (C2740)
-- Note: Canberra Airport ≠ Canberra Centre, but account 192549800 is the Zambrero account
-- Use the Zambrero account match instead: find which Zambrero customer has Canberra Airport
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Zambrero%' AND (name LIKE '%Majura%' OR name LIKE '%Airport%' OR name LIKE '%ACT%');
